description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a rectangular footprint. The structure is primarily composed of light-colored walls and a large wooden deck area that surrounds a central open space, possibly a courtyard or pool. The property is bordered by manicured hedges and includes landscaped elements such as potted plants and a pathway lined with greenery. There is an outdoor seating area adjacent to the main building, and the entrance is marked by a long, straight walkway. Large windows and open spaces suggest an emphasis on natural light and indoor-outdoor living. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with a focus on simplicity and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a wooden deck, landscaped greenery, and large windows, emphasizing open, minimalist design.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the main wooden deck, central open area, and a long hedge-lined pathway leading to the entrance.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the flat roof, potted plants, and the outdoor seating area adjacent to the main structure.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a clear look at the landscaped boundary, the side of the bungalow, and the arrangement of outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the entrance pathway, the flat roof, and the open courtyard area, with greenery flanking the approach.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large side and rear windows
